# Meiko Trans Polska

> Meiko Trans Polska Sp. z o.o. is a B2B logistics operator based in Gliwice, Poland, part of the international Meiko group originating from Japan. It combines warehousing, international freight forwarding (road, rail, sea, air) and customs handling in one operating model. Operating in Poland since 2005.

## Key facts
- Headquarters: ul. Leona Wyczółkowskiego 121, 44-109 Gliwice, Poland
- Operating since: 2005 (entity registered in KRS on 7 July 2006)
- Warehouse space: 21,980 m² confirmed in Gliwice across two facilities (9,500 m² + 12,480 m²); a third facility of approx. 18,500 m² is under construction in Tucznawa, Dąbrowa Górnicza
- Certifications: AEO (Authorised Economic Operator, authorisation PLAEOF330000190092, in force since 23.12.2019); ISO 9001:2015 (valid until 20.07.2027)
- Group network: present in 10 countries, 22 international locations (Europe, North America, Asia)
- Phone: +48 32 777 38 80
- E-mail: kontakt@meikotrans.com.pl
- VAT: PL6462735555 · KRS: 0000260193 · REGON: 240410775 · EORI: PL646273555500000

## Services
- Warehousing: block and high-bay storage, WMS, barcodes, PDA scanners, full pallet traceability
- International forwarding: road, rail, sea and air transport in one operating model
- Customs handling: clearances, bonded warehouse, temporary storage facility, customs guarantee, support in inspections and appeals
- Import/export: trade with third countries

## FAQ
- What does Meiko Trans Polska do? A logistics operator from Gliwice combining warehousing, international forwarding and customs handling, active in Poland since 2005 within the Meiko group.
- Where are the warehouses? Two in Gliwice (ul. Wyczółkowskiego 121 — 9,500 m²; ul. Gaudiego 6D — 12,480 m²), 21,980 m² total; a third (~18,500 m²) is being built in Dąbrowa Górnicza.
- Is the company AEO certified? Yes — AEO authorisation PLAEOF330000190092 (since 23.12.2019) and ISO 9001:2015 (valid until 20.07.2027).
- Which transport modes? Road, rail, sea and air.
- How to contact? +48 32 777 38 80, kontakt@meikotrans.com.pl, ul. Leona Wyczółkowskiego 121, 44-109 Gliwice.
